news:news.news:title: The ongoing Iran war raises concerns over Gaza's future and political tensions within the U.S., while various global incidents highlight significant unrest and legal disputes.
news:news.news:keywords: Iran war implications for Gaza, Nepal ex-PM protest crackdown, Maldives territorial disputes, US government shutdown effects, social media regulations for children

news:news.news:title: US stock markets closed down for the fifth consecutive week amid rising oil prices and geopolitical tensions related to the Iran war.
news:news.news:keywords: US border business struggles, stock market decline, minimum wage increase efforts, impact of Iran war on economy, Ticketmaster fee adjustments

news:news.news:title: TikTok's AI ad policy faces scrutiny, while Meta's legal issues raise questions about social media responsibility and OpenAI discontinues its video generation app Sora.
news:news.news:keywords: AI advertising challenges, Meta legal issues, OpenAI video generation, foldable phone technology, solar panel reviews

news:news.news:title: The NCAA Men's March Madness Elite Eight is set, while Tiger Woods faces legal issues following a DUI arrest.
news:news.news:keywords: NCAA Men's March Madness updates, Tiger Woods DUI arrest news, Connecticut Sun franchise sale, Luka Doncic technical foul suspension, Major League Cricket news

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries highlight health risks of sugar substitutes, advancements in carbon capture technology, and new insights into human evolution and animal behavior.
news:news.news:keywords: health risks of sugar substitutes, carbon capture technology advancements, human evolution discoveries, animal behavior research, space weather studies

news:news.news:title: Nepal's former Prime Minister was arrested following a deadly protest crackdown, while global tensions rise with Iran and North Korea's military ties.
news:news.news:keywords: Nepal protest crackdown, UN vote on slavery reparations, Iran military tensions, Cuba aid ships missing, euthanasia legal battles in Spain

news:news.news:title: US stock markets closed down for the fifth consecutive week amid rising oil prices and geopolitical tensions related to the Iran war.
news:news.news:keywords: US stock market trends, Trump's economic policies, minimum wage increase movements, impact of Iran war on US economy, rising costs of living in America

news:news.news:title: Sony has suspended sales of its memory cards due to shortages, while various tech products are on sale during the Big Spring Sale.
news:news.news:keywords: memory card shortages, Big Spring Sale discounts, new tech product launches, impact of data centers on environment, White House app features

news:news.news:title: Tiger Woods was arrested for DUI following a car crash, while college basketball teams advance in the NCAA tournament.
news:news.news:keywords: Tiger Woods DUI arrest, NCAA tournament updates, Connecticut Sun franchise sale

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries reveal new insights into human origins, bee nutrition, and the effects of Mars dust storms on water loss.
news:news.news:keywords: human evolution discoveries, bee nutrition breakthroughs, Mars water loss research, animal behavior studies, ocean species extinction

news:news.news:title: Tiger Woods Arrested for DUI After Car Crash, Adding to Sports Drama Amid NCAA Tournament Excitement
